Index

A D G M R S T U 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

add(RationalNumber) - Method in class RationalNumber
Adds the given rationalNumber to this RationalNumber and returns the sum as a new RationalNumber.

D

divide(RationalNumber) - Method in class RationalNumber
Divides the given RationalNumber to this RationalNumber and returns the division result.

G

getDenominator() - Method in class RationalNumber
Returns the denominator of this RationalNumber.
getDoubleValue() - Method in class RationalNumber
Returns the value of this RationalNumber as a double value.
getGcd() - Method in class RationalNumber
Returns the gcd of the numerator and the denominator
getNumerator() - Method in class RationalNumber
Returns the numerator of this RationalNumber.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class UseRationalNumber
Main function to perform all the available operations, on a user given Rational Number, and print all of them.
multiply(RationalNumber) - Method in class RationalNumber
Multiplies the given RationalNumber to this RationalNumber and returns the multiplied value as a new Rational Number.

R

RationalNumber - Class in Unnamed Package
A rational number given by a numerator and denominator.
RationalNumber() - Constructor for class RationalNumber
creates a new Rational Number (Default Constructor)
RationalNumber(int) - Constructor for class RationalNumber
creates a new RationalNumber with given numerator
RationalNumber(int, int) - Constructor for class RationalNumber
Creates a new RationalNumber with given numerator and denominator.
reciprocal() - Method in class RationalNumber
Returns the reciprocal of this RationalNumber.

S

subtract(RationalNumber) - Method in class RationalNumber
Subtracts the given RationalNumer to this RationalNumber and returns the subtracted value as a new Rational Number.

T

toString() - Method in class RationalNumber
Returns the string representation of the object.

U

UseRationalNumber - Class in Unnamed Package
Uses the Rational Number class to create a Rational Number using user input and prints out its GCD, Reduced fraction, doubleValue and multiply, divide, add and subtract with “6/7” rational number.
UseRationalNumber() - Constructor for class UseRationalNumber
